question: What are the ids and dates of the orders with at least two products?
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.date_order_placed FROM Orders o JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 2;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有至少两个商品项的订单信息

semantic.reason: 缺少关键过滤条件，应通过COUNT(order_item_id) >= 2筛选订单，且需确保正确关联Order_Items表与Orders表
